Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Gekkoukan High School... A place of learning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's quite a shock that such a warm, illustrious institution transforms into Tartarus every night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}Everyone here seems to have a predetermined form of attire... I fear I may draw too much attention.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I hope this won't pose a problem...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}Now then, excuse me as I make myself less conspicuous...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Please excuse me as I make myself less conspicuous...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}If I stay hidden from view this way, then there won't be a problem, correct?[n]{f 1 1}
